fields.name: bidDisplayText
fields.fieldText: Please input the Hardware and Service Bids for {!Loop_All_Items_for_Bid.Product_Name__c}

fields.name: Would_you_like_to_approve_reject_or_update
fields.fieldText: Would you like to approve, reject or update more lines?

screens.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_Pricing_Approved_Screen
screens.label: Copy 1 of Copy 1 of Pricing Approved Screen

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_pricingApproved
fields.fieldText: Pricing has been rejected for this deal.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_pricingApproved
fields.fieldText: Pricing has been approved for this deal.

value.stringValue: [{"apiName":"Product_Name__c","guid":"column-e9fd","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":0,"label":"Product Name","type":"customRichText"},{"apiName":"Mono_Meter_Cost__c","guid":"column-42ab","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":1,"label":"Mono Meter Price","type":"currency"},{"apiName":"Colour_Meter_Cost__c","guid":"column-0bfe","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":2,"label":"Colour Meter Price","type":"currency"},{"apiName":"Large_Mono_Cost__c","guid":"column-bca9","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":3,"label":"Large Mono Price","type":"currency"},{"apiName":"Large_Colour_Cost__c","guid":"column-359f","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":4,"label":"Large Colour Price","type":"currency"},{"apiName":"XLS_Cost__c","guid":"column-307b","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":5,"label":"XLS Mono Price","type":"currency"},{"apiName":"XLS_Colour_Price__c","guid":"column-7db3","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":6,"label":"XLS Colour Price","type":"currency"}]
